title: ZXSpace Game Modes
description: Discover the game modes planned for ZXSpace, from the core Solo city-defence experience to future multiplayer battles.
summary: Defend your cities in Solo mode today, with additional multiplayer experiences planned for future updates.

sections.heading: Solo Play
paragraphs: Solo Play is the heart of ZXSpace. Defend your cities against waves of invading aliens, protect your shields, collect power-ups, and survive for as long as possible.
Every completed wave rewards quick reactions, accurate aiming, and careful city defence while helping you unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and climb the leaderboards.

sections.heading: Future Multiplayer
paragraphs: ZXSpace is designed to grow over time, with additional multiplayer modes planned for future updates.
As new game modes become available, this guide will be updated with everything you need to know about playing with friends and competing online.

sections.heading: Choose Your Challenge
paragraphs: If you're new to ZXSpace, start with Solo Play to learn the controls, understand alien attack patterns, and master the game's defensive mechanics.
As additional game modes are introduced, you'll be able to build on those skills and take on new challenges.

images.caption: Choose your mission and prepare to defend your cities.

faq.question: Will ZXSpace include multiplayer?
faq.answer: Additional multiplayer modes are planned for future updates. Solo Play is currently the main gameplay experience.

featureShowcases.heading: Defend Your Cities
featureShowcases.summary: Protect your cities, survive increasingly difficult alien waves, and prepare for future multiplayer battles.
body: Solo Play is where every commander begins. Learn to defend your cities, master the controls, collect power-ups, and overcome increasingly difficult alien attacks.
As ZXSpace grows, new multiplayer experiences will expand the challenge while building on the same fast-paced arcade gameplay.
bullets: Unlock achievements and earn BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every wave prepares you for the challenges ahead.
